description_long: This is a standard orange basketball with a pebbled surface texture and deep black seams forming a traditional eight-panel pattern. The ball's surface is covered in small, raised dots that provide grip, and the seams are slightly recessed, creating a tactile contrast. The coloration is a classic burnt orange, with the seams appearing in a dark brown or black shade. There are no visible logos, brand markings, or inflation valve on any side of the ball. The ball appears clean and free from any visible wear, scuff marks, or graffiti. Its size and proportions are consistent with a regulation basketball, commonly seen in urban parks, playgrounds, and sports courts.
description: A classic orange basketball with a pebbled texture and dark seams forming an eight-panel pattern, clean and unmarked.
description_view_0: The basketball shows a prominent seam curving from the top left to the bottom right, with the pebbled texture clearly visible.
description_view_1: This view highlights a different section of the seam pattern, with the surface texture and orange color remaining consistent.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this angle shows the same seam configuration and pebbled surface, with no visible markings.
description_view_3: The seam curves are more central in this view, and the ball's texture and color are unchanged.
attribute_panel_pattern: Eight-panel pattern with deep, curved seams forming symmetrical sections around the ball.
